title: CP9 Battles in the Tower of Justice: Aftermath

dialogue.text: An under- ground passage beneath the sea!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Waaaah hahaha. They can't follow us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
